div.p: FFN(x) = W₂ · ReLU(W₁ · x + b₁) + b₂ Per-token non-linear transformation with 4× expansion

text.tspan: # ReLU: simple but can have "dying neurons"
# ReLU: simple but can have "dying neurons"
Non-linearity enables the model to learn
complex functions that cannot be expressed

g.text: d_ff = d_ff or 4 * d_model # Default: 4× expansion

text.tspan: # Without non-linearity, FFN collapses to single linear transform:
# FFN(x) = W2 · (W1 · x) = (W2 · W1) · x = W_combined · x
# This is just one matrix multiplication!
# The model loses ALL expressive power.
# Cannot be simplified - true non-linear transform
# Without non-linearity, FFN collapses to single linear transform:
# FFN(x) = W2 · (W1 · x) = (W2 · W1) · x = W_combined · x
# This is just one matrix multiplication!
# The model loses ALL expressive power.
# Cannot be simplified - true non-linear transform
